description: A high-contrast dark editorial identity — deep charcoal foundations, electric amber as the singular accent, and a typographic system that leads with authority. Designed for technology, consulting, and professional services proposals that need to feel premium without leaning into generic 'tech startup' clichés.
customInstructions: Deep black backgrounds (#0a0a0e to #111118 range). A single dominant amber/gold accent (#f59e0b) — never dilute it with a second competing accent colour. Syne for all headings at heavy weight with tight letter-spacing (-0.02em to -0.04em). DM Sans for body at 16–18px with generous line-height (1.7). Cards and panels use a slightly lighter surface (#16161e) with a 1px border at rgba(245,158,11,0.15). No rounded pill buttons — use sharp 4px radius or fully square. Section dividers should use a thin amber rule (2px, 40% opacity) rather than a full-width border. The hero section should have an asymmetric layout with the headline spanning 70% viewport width at very large size (clamp 3rem to 8vw). Gradient text is allowed ONLY on the primary headline — amber to warm gold direction. All other text must be solid colour. Spacing is generous: sections have 120–160px vertical padding. No gradients on backgrounds — flat colour only. Box shadows should use amber tint: 0 4px 24px rgba(245,158,11,0.12).
